info.name: Soccer Team Report API
info.description: Complete API collection for the soccer-team-report platform. Covers authentication, team management, player management, match scheduling, and match reports.

variable.description: Filled automatically by the Login request test script

request.description: Success: 200 OK with {status, service, database, checked_at}. May return 503 Service Unavailable with the same health payload when the database is unavailable. Common error shape when applicable: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {access_token, token_type, expires_at, user, company}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 invalid_credentials, 500 internal_error. 404 and 409 are not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {user, company}. Common errors: 401 unauthorized, 500 internal_error. 400, 404, and 409 are not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 201 Created with {id, company_id, name, logo_image_id, founded_year, homebase_address, city_of_homebase_address}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 409 team_name_conflict or team_logo_conflict, 500 internal_error. 404 is not expected on create. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {items:[{id, company_id, name, logo_image_id, founded_year, homebase_address, city_of_homebase_address}], meta:{page, limit, total_items, total_pages, has_next_page, has_prev_page}}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request (invalid page/limit), 401 unauthorized, 500 internal_error. 404 and 409 are not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, company_id, name, logo_image_id, founded_year, homebase_address, city_of_homebase_address}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, company_id, name, logo_image_id, founded_year, homebase_address, city_of_homebase_address}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found, 409 team_name_conflict or team_logo_conflict, 500 internal_error. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 204 No Content with an empty response body. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 201 Created with {id, team_id, name, height, weight, position, player_number, profile_image_id}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found, 409 player_number_conflict or profile_image_conflict, 500 internal_error. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {items:[{id, team_id, name, height, weight, position, player_number, profile_image_id}], meta:{page, limit, total_items, total_pages, has_next_page, has_prev_page}}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request (invalid team_id/page/limit), 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, team_id, name, height, weight, position, player_number, profile_image_id}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found or player_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, team_id, name, height, weight, position, player_number, profile_image_id}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found or player_not_found, 409 player_number_conflict or profile_image_conflict, 500 internal_error. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 204 No Content with an empty response body. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found or player_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 201 Created with {id, company_id, match_date, match_time, home_team_id, guest_team_id}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 team_not_found, 409 schedule_conflict, 500 internal_error. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {items:[{id, company_id, match_date, match_time, home_team_id, guest_team_id}], meta:{page, limit, total_items, total_pages, has_next_page, has_prev_page}}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request (invalid page/limit), 401 unauthorized, 500 internal_error. 404 and 409 are not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, company_id, match_date, match_time, home_team_id, guest_team_id}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 schedule_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, company_id, match_date, match_time, home_team_id, guest_team_id}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 schedule_not_found or team_not_found, 409 schedule_conflict, 500 internal_error. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 204 No Content with an empty response body. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 schedule_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 201 Created with {id, company_id, match_schedule_id, home_team_id, guest_team_id, final_score_home, final_score_guest, status_match, most_scoring_goal_player_id, accumulate_total_win_for_home_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule, accumulate_total_win_for_guest_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 schedule_not_found or top_scorer_not_found, 409 report_conflict, 500 internal_error. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {items:[{id, company_id, match_schedule_id, home_team_id, guest_team_id, final_score_home, final_score_guest, status_match, most_scoring_goal_player_id, accumulate_total_win_for_home_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule, accumulate_total_win_for_guest_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule}], meta:{page, limit, total_items, total_pages, has_next_page, has_prev_page}}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request (invalid page/limit), 401 unauthorized, 500 internal_error. 404 and 409 are not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, company_id, match_schedule_id, home_team_id, guest_team_id, final_score_home, final_score_guest, status_match, most_scoring_goal_player_id, accumulate_total_win_for_home_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule, accumulate_total_win_for_guest_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 report_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 200 OK with {id, company_id, match_schedule_id, home_team_id, guest_team_id, final_score_home, final_score_guest, status_match, most_scoring_goal_player_id, accumulate_total_win_for_home_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule, accumulate_total_win_for_guest_team_from_start_to_the_current_match_schedule}. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 report_not_found or schedule_not_found or top_scorer_not_found, 409 report_conflict, 500 internal_error. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.

Success: 204 No Content with an empty response body. Common errors: 400 invalid_request, 401 unauthorized, 404 report_not_found, 500 internal_error. 409 is not expected for this endpoint. Error shape: {"error":"<error_code>","message":"<human readable message>"}.
